projects.name: LaunchLens AI
projects.description: AI-powered go-to-market workspace for product research, launch planning, positioning, and structured GTM briefs.
projects.tagline: AI-powered go-to-market workspace — research, positioning & GTM briefs.

projects.name: LaunchLens Research Studio
projects.description: Multi-agent market intelligence workspace - companion to launchlens-ai. 6 AI agents research any product idea in parallel.
projects.tagline: Multi-agent market intelligence — 6 AI agents research any product in parallel.

projects.name: Model Eval Studio
projects.description: AI-driven multi-model evaluation workspace. Upload screenshots and artifacts, let AI identify models, analyze hard metrics, and generate structured comparison reports.
projects.tagline: Multi-model evaluation workspace — AI identifies models from screenshots & generates comparison reports.

projects.name: Codex ↔ ZCode Remote Relay
projects.description: Local Codex-to-ZCode multi-agent relay experiment with bounded delegation, worker pools, and safety gates.
projects.tagline: Local Codex-to-ZCode multi-agent relay — bounded delegation, worker pools, safety gates.

projects.name: LangGraph Financial Swarm
projects.description: Multi-agent financial research system built with LangGraph-style orchestration, local LLM workflows, tool use, and structured analysis.
projects.tagline: Multi-agent financial research system — LangGraph orchestration, local LLMs, tool use.

projects.name: Safety-Critical Battery Prognostics
projects.description: A reproducible battery prognostics repository with a three-layer physics defense, bounded real-data reporting, and uncertainty-aware evaluation.
projects.tagline: Reproducible battery RUL — three-layer physics defense, uncertainty-aware evaluation.

projects.name: Structure-Aware RAG (Empirical)
projects.description: An empirical study improving Financial RAG accuracy by 37.5% (50.0% → 68.8%) using Structure-Aware Parsing. Benchmarking LlamaParse vs. PyPDF on complex cross-row tabular reasoning tasks.
projects.tagline: Empirical study — Structure-Aware Parsing lifts Financial RAG accuracy by 37.5%.
